subcodes.title: Letter to Him Whom God shall make manifest
subcodes.first_line: He is God, no God is there but Him, the Almighty, the Best Beloved. All that are in the heavens and on the earth and whatever lieth between them are His.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الابهی. الله لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب له ما فی السموات و ما فی الارض و ما بینهما و هو المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
full_text_parts: He is God, no God is there but Him, the Almighty, the Best-Beloved. All that are in the heavens and on the earth and whatever lieth between them are His. Verily He is the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.
